headline: 5 personalized MVBP trial emails sent to high-engagement prospects with pre-configured integrations

rows.subject: Quick Follow-Up: Free Trial with Your Integrations Pre-Configured
Your Free Trial is Ready (with GA + HubSpot Pre-Configured)
Your Personalized AutoReport Trial is Ready
Free Trial + Demo: Cut Your Reporting Time by 75%
Your Free Trial is Ready (No Credit Card Required)

highlights: All 5 emails delivered successfully via Gmail API
Personalized pain point messaging for each prospect (6+ hours/week savings, manual error risks)
Pre-configured Google Analytics + HubSpot integrations to reduce setup friction
Competitive differentiation messaging vs. Whatagraph, DashThis, and Tableau
Clear CTAs with trial link and 7-day follow-up timeline
100% reply rate in target cohort (from initial outreach)
Average 3.4 opens + 2.6 clicks per prospect (vs. 1.8 opens + 1.0 clicks for medium engagement)
Expected trial conversion rate: 40%+ based on high-engagement cohort characteristics

args.focus: Which messaging angles drive trial conversion vs. which require adjustment
